title: Chip8 Interpreter
description: A Chip8 virtual machine interpreter written in Rust and compiled to WebAssembly.

title: Face Blending App
description: Laplacian image blending built for a computer vision final — blends faces nearly seamlessly with reference images.

title: Naive Bayes Tutorial
description: Intro to Probability final — an interactive walkthrough of the Naive Bayes classifier from a probability POV.

title: Where Da Trash At
description: PennApps Fall 2019 — a sustainability web-app that classifies high-density trash areas using Google Cloud Vision.
